languages.text: "Жизнь — это момент между рождением и смертью. Она начинается и заканчивается вне зависимости от того какое значение мы ей придаем".
"Life is the moment between birth and death. It begins and ends regardless of whatever meaning we may ascribe to it."
languages.original_text: "Жизнь — это момент между рождением и смертью. Она начинается и заканчивается вне зависимости от того какое значение мы ей придаем".

traits.locale_text: "Life is the moment between birth and death. It begins and ends regardless of whatever meaning we may ascribe to it."
"Life is the moment between birth and death. It begins and ends regardless of whatever meaning we may ascribe to it."
"Life is the moment between birth and death. It begins and ends regardless of whatever meaning we may ascribe to it."

languages.text: «La vida es el período entre el nacimiento y la muerte. Comienza y termina independientemente del significado que queramos asignarle».
languages.original_text: "Life is the moment between birth and death. It begins and ends regardless of whatever meaning we may ascribe to it."

traits.locale_text: «La vida es el período entre el nacimiento y la muerte. Comienza y termina independientemente del significado que queramos asignarle».

languages.text: “生命就是出生到死亡之间的那段时间。不管我们赋予它什么意义，它该来就来，该走就走。”
languages.original_text: "Life is the moment between birth and death. It begins and ends regardless of whatever meaning we may ascribe to it."

traits.locale_text: “生命就是出生到死亡之间的那段时间。不管我们赋予它什么意义，它该来就来，该走就走。”

languages.text: « La vie, c'est le temps qui s'écoule entre la naissance et la mort. Elle commence et elle se termine, quel que soit le sens qu'on lui accorde. »
languages.original_text: "Life is the moment between birth and death. It begins and ends regardless of whatever meaning we may ascribe to it."

traits.locale_text: « La vie, c'est le temps qui s'écoule entre la naissance et la mort. Elle commence et elle se termine, quel que soit le sens qu'on lui accorde. »

languages.text: "Das Leben ist der Moment zwischen Geburt und Tod. Es beginnt und endet unabhängig von der Bedeutung, die wir ihm beimessen."
languages.original_text: "Life is the moment between birth and death. It begins and ends regardless of whatever meaning we may ascribe to it."

traits.locale_text: "Das Leben ist der Moment zwischen Geburt und Tod. Es beginnt und endet unabhängig von der Bedeutung, die wir ihm beimessen."

languages.text: 「人生とは、誕生と死の間の瞬間である。私たちがそれにどのような意味を付与しようとも、それは始まり、そして終わる。」
languages.original_text: "Life is the moment between birth and death. It begins and ends regardless of whatever meaning we may ascribe to it."

traits.locale_text: 「人生とは、誕生と死の間の瞬間である。私たちがそれにどのような意味を付与しようとも、それは始まり、そして終わる。」

languages.text: "Hayat, doğumla ölüm arasındaki andır. Biz ona ne anlam yüklersek yükleyelim hayat başlar ve biter."
languages.original_text: "Life is the moment between birth and death. It begins and ends regardless of whatever meaning we may ascribe to it."

traits.locale_text: "Hayat, doğumla ölüm arasındaki andır. Biz ona ne anlam yüklersek yükleyelim hayat başlar ve biter."
